column1: # Rows marked [est] are derived from roofline/scaling analysis
# FP8 entries: kernel time derived from FP8 vs BF16 scaling ratios in TRT-LLM
# (FP8 ≈ 2× faster decode/prefill vs BF16 due to half weight bytes + 2× TFLOPS).
# vLLM benchmark: llama-3-8B decode throughput ~160 tok/s (batch=1) → ~6.3ms/tok
# FP8 tensor cores deliver 1978 TFLOPS (2× BF16); weight bytes halved → 2× decode speedup.
# Kernel times from TRT-LLM nsys profiles; framework overhead (3ms) subtracted.
# MLCommons MLPerf v4.0: Llama-2-70B on 8×H100 SXM5
# vLLM TP=8 decode: ~8ms/step on cluster → ~64ms single-GPU-equivalent
